news.title: Sony announces A7V with 42MP sensor and improved AF
news.summary: Sony has announced the A7V featuring a new 42MP sensor, improved autofocus system with AI subject detection.

news.title: Canon EOS R6 Mark III rumored for Q2 2026
news.summary: According to sources, Canon is preparing the EOS R6 Mark III with stacked sensor technology.

news.title: Nikon Z7 III specifications leaked
news.summary: Detailed specs of the upcoming Nikon Z7 III have appeared online, suggesting 60MP sensor.
